# seerr_user_permissions (Data Source)

Read Seerr user permissions via /api/v1/user/{userId}.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `user_id` (Number) The numeric ID of the user to look up.

### Read-Only

- `permissions` (Number) Numeric permissions bitmask for the user.
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response body.
- `status_code` (Number) HTTP status code.
